suite: Deduplicate Student Session

title: Student Assignment – Staff Submits via Lesson Detail While Another Staff Submits via Calendar Simultaneously – Only One Session Created
description: AC 01 / BR-03 / BR-05 — Negative Testing. Simulates two staff members adding the same student to the same lesson from different surfaces at the same moment. Only one student_session must be created; the second concurrent insert is silently rejected at DB level.
preconditions:
- Staff User A has Lesson X detail open, Add Student popup open, Student A selected (not yet submitted)
- Staff User B has SF Calendar open, Lesson X popup open, Add Student popup open, Student A selected (not yet submitted)
- Student A is not yet assigned to Lesson X
steps_actions:
1. "Staff User A and Staff User B both click Add at the same moment"
2. "Wait for both responses to return"
3. "Count student_session records for (Student A, Lesson X)"
4. "Open Lesson X detail page"
steps_result:
1. "Both requests are submitted to the server concurrently"
2. "At least one response succeeds; the other is silently ignored — no error screen shown to either user"
3. "Exactly 1 record"
4. "Student A appears once in the Student Sessions list"
suite: Concurrent Add — Lesson Detail + Calendar (Same Time) | Qase ID: 2793

title: Student Assignment – Staff Adds via Calendar While Class Auto-Assign Queue Is Running – Only One Session Created
description: AC 01 / BR-05 / BR-18 / F-11 — Negative Testing. This is the exact root cause scenario of the 2026-04-07 incident. Staff manually adds a class student from the Calendar popup while the class auto-assign queue is simultaneously creating sessions for all class members including that student.
preconditions:
- A group lesson with Class A (35 students including Student A) has been created — class auto-assign queue triggered but not yet completed
- Staff User is on the SF Calendar lesson popup with the Add Student popup open and Student A selected (not yet submitted)
steps_actions:
1. "While the class auto-assign queue is still running, Staff User clicks Add for Student A in the Calendar popup"
2. "Wait for the queue job to finish"
3. "Count student_session records for (Student A, Lesson X)"
4. "Verify the other 34 class students each have exactly 1 session"
steps_result:
1. "The manual add request is submitted concurrently with the queue"
2. "The queue completes without error — the already-inserted session is silently skipped"
3. "Exactly 1 record — the first insert won; the second was rejected at DB level"
4. "Each of the 34 students has exactly 1 session — the queue did not fail or skip them"
suite: Concurrent Add — Lesson Detail + Calendar (Same Time) | Qase ID: 2793

title: [Nichibei] Student Books via App While Staff Assigns Same Student via SF Simultaneously – Only One Session Created and No Extra Point Charge
description: AC 01 / BR-09 / BR-21 — CRUD Testing + Regression Analysis. Simulates a Nichibei student tapping Reserve on the app at the exact same moment a staff member assigns that student from SF. Only one student_session must be created and only one point consumed.
preconditions:
- Nichibei partner feature is enabled
- Lesson X has Booking Flag = TRUE, date >= today + X days, capacity available, location matches Student A active LA
- Student A has an active LA with 10 remaining bookable points
- Student A is NOT yet assigned to Lesson X
- Student A is logged in to the student/parent app with Reserve button visible for Lesson X
- Staff User is logged in to SF Calendar with Add Student popup open for Lesson X, Student A selected (not yet submitted)
steps_actions:
1. "Student A taps Reserve on Lesson X in the app and Staff User clicks Add for Student A in the Calendar popup at the same moment"
2. "Wait for both responses"
3. "Count student_session records for (Student A, Lesson X)"
4. "Check Student A remaining bookable points on the LA"
steps_result:
1. "Both requests are submitted concurrently"
2. "At least one succeeds; the other is silently rejected — no error screen on either side"
3. "Exactly 1 record"
4. "Points = 9 — exactly one point consumed, not two"

steps_result:

title: [Nichibei] Atomic Booking – Concurrent Insert Causes Mid-Flow Rejection – No Orphaned Data
description: AC 01 / BR-09 / F-06 — Regression Analysis. The Nichibei atomic booking flow is: validate → create session → save remarks → auto-publish. If a concurrent insert wins the race and the app session insert is rejected mid-flow, the entire booking must be rolled back atomically — no orphaned session, remark, or premature publish.
preconditions:
- Nichibei partner feature is enabled
- Lesson X is a Draft lesson, Booking Flag = TRUE
- Student A has a valid active LA with 10 available points
- Student A is logged in and has Reserve visible for Lesson X
- Staff User is on SF Calendar, Add Student popup open, Student A selected, about to submit at the same time Student A taps Reserve
steps_actions:
1. "Student A taps Reserve on Lesson X and Staff User clicks Add simultaneously — the staff-side insert wins the race"
2. "Check student_session records for (Student A, Lesson X)"
3. "Check attendance_response_remark for (Student A, Lesson X)"
4. "Check the publish status of Lesson X"
5. "Check Student A remaining bookable points"
steps_result:
1. "Both requests submitted; the staff-side insert wins the race; the app-side insert is rejected mid-flow by the DB constraint"
2. "Exactly 1 record (the staff-assigned session)"
3. "No Booking Note: remark was created (app booking rolled back before the remark step)"
4. "Lesson X remains Draft — it was NOT auto-published (app booking rolled back before auto-publish)"
5. "Points remain at 10 — no point consumed for the rejected app booking"
suite_without_cases: [Nichibei] Concurrent Booking — App + Staff (Same Time) | Qase ID: 2799
